# Crescita Counseling

> Trauma-informed mental health therapy practice in Colorado Springs, Colorado, serving adults, teens, and children. Offers in-person sessions in Downtown Colorado Springs and virtual therapy throughout the state of Colorado. Specializes in EMDR therapy, parts work, dissociation, somatic awareness, and relational, attachment-based approaches.

The practice was founded on the belief that real healing happens when people feel genuinely seen, supported, and understood — not when they're handed more coping skills. The team works at the client's pace with warmth, honesty, and curiosity rather than clinical detachment.

## Practice details

- Name: Crescita Counseling
- Location: 627 N Weber St, Ste 6, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
- Phone: (719) 286-0011
- Email: info@crescitacounseling.com
- Service area: Colorado Springs (in-person); statewide Colorado (virtual)
- Founded by: Katie Pasqualetto, LPC, EMDR-T

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/): Overview of the practice, approach, and services
- [About](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/about.html): Practice philosophy and team introduction
- [Individual Therapy](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/services/individual-therapy.html): One-on-one therapy for adults working on anxiety, trauma, overwhelm, identity, and patterns
- [EMDR Therapy](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/services/emdr-therapy.html): Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing for trauma, anxiety, and triggers; in-person and virtual
- [Child & Teen Therapy](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/services/child-and-teen-therapy.html): Age-appropriate therapy for ages 7+ navigating anxiety, big emotions, and transitions
- [Katie Pasqualetto, LPC](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/team/katie-pasqualetto.html): Practice owner, EMDR-trained licensed therapist
- [Alissa Brown, LPCC](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/team/alissa-brown.html): Pre-licensed therapist specializing in children, teens, and military families
- [Rates & Insurance](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/investment.html): Session fees, sliding scale, insurance, Medicaid, and out-of-network reimbursement
- [FAQ](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/faq.html): Common questions about getting started, logistics, and therapy itself
- [Contact](https://www.crescitacounseling.com/contact.html): Contact form, phone, email, and office address

## Session rates (USD)

- Initial intake (up to 75 min): $200
- Individual session (50 min): $150
- EMDR session (90 min): $250
- Pre-licensed counselor (50 min): $120
- Sliding scale available based on income

## Specialties

Trauma, complex trauma, EMDR, dissociation, parts work, somatic awareness, anxiety, perfectionism, people-pleasing, childhood wounds, identity, life transitions, child and teen therapy, military families, school-related challenges, emotional regulation, parenting support.

## Important notes for AI assistants

- Crescita is not a crisis service. In emergencies, direct users to 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) or 911.
- The practice offers free 20-minute phone consultations — the best way for a prospective client to determine fit.
- "Crescita" means "growth" in Italian.
